name: ai-hands
description: Hook-capable AI-Hands MCP plugin with dense ability routing, safety, workflows, and reviewed lifecycle-hook templates.

interface.shortDescription: Operate interfaces with optional reviewed hooks.
interface.longDescription: Routes current-state browser, Windows UIA, vision, monitor-scoped, and live network work through AI-Hands and includes inert lifecycle-hook templates for hosts that can review, trust, and prove them.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this interface, act safely, and verify the result.
Fence this automation to one monitor before acting.
